Figure 1: The architecture of our proposed DSEvolve framework.

Table 5: Per-framework breakdown of probe rule sensitivity. Bold entries indicate the best probe rule within each framework/scenario combination. All probe-based strategies substantially outperform the non-probe baselines (Top, Random) regardless of the evolutionary framework, while the inter-probe variance remains below 0.8%.
